title: Aflac: Should Be Part Of Any Dividend Growth Portfolio
text: Aflac is a company specializing in health and life insurance products, operating in Japan and the United States. Aflac reported increased total revenues and net earnings for Q3 2023, driven by growth initiatives in the U.S. market. The company has a strong dividend growth track record, with a low payout ratio and a 19% increase in the first-quarter 2024 dividend.

title: Statement from Aflac Incorporated and Trupanion Confirming Commitment to Strategic Alliance in North America
text: COLUMBUS, Ga. and SEATTLE, Dec. 14, 2023 /PRNewswire/ --  "Since the establishment of a strategic business alliance in November 2020, Aflac Incorporated and Trupanion have shared a common belief that employers should consider a package of benefits for their employees to address the increasing number of consumers whose pets are a vital part of their families.

title: Aflac and Trupanion Comment on Renewed S-3 Registration Statement Filed in Accordance with 2020 Shareholder Agreement
text: COLUMBUS, Ga. and SEATTLE , Dec. 4, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Aflac Incorporated (NYSE: AFL), a Fortune 500 company and leading provider of supplemental health insurance in Japan and the United States, and Trupanion, Inc. (Nasdaq: TRUP), the leading provider of medical insurance for cats and dogs, jointly announce Trupanion's renewal of an S-3 registration statement on December 1, 2023.
